report.summary: Cycle 9 EOD: 2 new pages built since last cycle (yield-tokenization guide + token-security-scanner tool), 366 uncommitted files (+10 from v8), 145 TS errors stable, 0 regressions, deploy still critical blocker at 3+ days

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 2 new pages verified since last cycle: /learn/yield-tokenization-guide-2026 and /tools/token-security-scanner — both have page.tsx files confirmed on disk
596 published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES, 1,225 total page.tsx files in src/app — 105 legacy slugs still missing page.tsx (82% coverage, unchanged)

145 TypeScript errors across 6 files (stable, unchanged from v8): crypto-arbitrage-strategies, crypto-index-funds, institutional-crypto-adoption, lido-v3-stvaults, rwa-yield-vs-defi-yield-comparison, structured-data.examples.ts — all JSX syntax issues, non-blocking for production build
No regressions detected. No new broken pages introduced since last cycle
Network egress blocked — unable to verify live HTTP 200 status on degen0x.com. Code-level audit only

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 6 core API routes verified in codebase: fear-greed (10min TTL), trending (5min TTL), market-metrics (60s TTL), market-dominance (5min TTL), prices (60s TTL), defi-yields (5min TTL)
All routes have in-memory cache + CDN s-maxage + stale-while-revalidate headers. All include fallback logic serving stale cache on upstream failure
CoinGecko free tier still in use (no API key in route files). Rate limiting risk remains at scale
0/6 public API routes have request-level rate limiting. /api/health uses rate limiting but has mock health checks — both flagged as tech debt from prior cycles
No changes to API route files since last cycle. Data layer is stable

sections.title: DevOps
items: HEAD at commit 21aaf5b (Mar 25 batch deploy) — unchanged for 3+ days. 366 uncommitted files (up +10 from 356 in v8)
CRITICAL: Deploy blocker now in 19th+ consecutive cycle. All content built since Mar 25 remains invisible to production
New delta this cycle: yield-tokenization guide + token-security-scanner tool built but cannot reach production without git push
TypeScript compilation succeeds (145 errors are non-blocking). Build would likely succeed if committed and pushed
Unable to verify live Vercel deployment status due to network egress restrictions

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: build-7 created yield-tokenization-guide-2026 (learn article) and token-security-scanner (interactive tool). Both SEO-ready with metadata
CUMULATIVE TODAY (Mar 28): 7+ build cycles, 18+ new pages, 9+ standup rotations, 5+ publish cycles, 8+ design cycles, 9+ community cycles, 9 EOD reviews

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS: (1) P0 — 366 uncommitted files need git commit + push to deploy. (2) P1 — 2 PUBLISH_QUEUE items blocked (wallet-security, restaking slug issues). (3) P1 — 6 queue items ready to promote (DePIN, Gas Fees, Bear Market, Smart Money + yield-tokenization, token-security-scanner). (4) P2 — 105 published slugs missing page.tsx. (5) P2 — 0/6 API routes rate-limited. (6) P3 — Health endpoint uses mock checks
NEEDS JEFE: Git commit + push remains the single highest-leverage action. One push unlocks 3 days of accumulated work for Google indexing
